例：基于当前共识，拆出 P0/P1 任务并给出验收标准。: e.g., Based on current Consensus, break out P0/P1 tasks with acceptance criteria.
例：把方括号改成花括号；或：用 enumerate 不要 range: e.g., Replace square brackets with curly braces; or: use enumerate instead of range

每大轮含 R1 提案 / R2 互评 / R3 终稿；N>1 时下一大轮 R1: Each major round has R1 propose / R2 critique / R3 final; when N>1, the next round's R1 reads the previous R3 before proposing independently
目标模式：不因阶段轮数/输出截断/交付门禁未过而自然停止，自动返工直到验收通过；: Goal mode: won't stop naturally from round count / output truncation / unmet delivery gates—auto-reworks until acceptance passes; hard blocks (manual stop, all models unavailable, quota exhausted) still pause.
